_measured_with: miniredis v2.37.0, go-redis v9.18.0, 200 iterations, benchmem
_note_bulk: MGetJSON/SMembers/ZRangeWithScores/Scan/HScan reflect bulk-size-proportional work (10/100/1k/10k/1k elements respectively). SRem/ZRem benches include a paired SAdd/ZAdd per iteration since removes need a prior insert.
